summary: Updated the init UI Codex model shortlist to the requested five-model lineup and added focused tests that lock both the curated list and the picker display order.
work_completed: Replaced the legacy Codex model shortlist in src/control_tower/config_ui.py with gpt-5.4, gpt-5.4-mini, gpt-5.3-codex, gpt-5.2-codex, and gpt-5.2 in the requested order.
Added focused tests in tests/test_bootstrap.py to verify the Codex shortlist contents and the picker display order.
Verified the change with targeted unittest coverage using the local src tree via PYTHONPATH=src.

findings.message: Verification passed with: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m unittest tests.test_bootstrap.BackendTests.test_codex_model_picker_defaults_match_curated_order tests.test_bootstrap.BackendTests.test_codex_model_picker_displays_curated_defaults_in_order tests.test_bootstrap.BackendTests.test_valid_backends tests.test_bootstrap.BootstrapTests.test_interactive_config_can_disable_agent tests.test_bootstrap.BootstrapTests.test_custom_config_can_set_sandboxed_builder tests.test_bootstrap.CustomAgentTests.test_interactive_custom_agent_creation
pytest was not available in the active Python environment, so verification used unittest instead.
